notes: Free admission for up to 9. Ship admission free first-come first-served with security inspection and photo ID for visitors over 18.
raw: (617) 426-1812 Pass benefits: Admits up to 9 for free to the Museum. Admission to the Ship is free on a first-come, first-served basis and requires a security inspection and photo identification for visitors over 18. Visit the USS Constitution Museum's website. Digital (downloadable via email) passes are available. Select your desired visit date from the calendar below.
